title: スプリンターズSの後に・王の道

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"The Sprinting Heroine King Halo." "Will she
conquer the Dual Sprints again next year?" As
King Halo soaks up the glory of this breaking
news article, her cell phone rings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's King Halo's mother, asking whether her next
plans are to run another sprint or a mile race.
King Halo's answer—the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taken aback by her daughter's apparent caprice,
King Halo's mother tells her to make sure she
wins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, at least this time, she doesn't tell King Halo
to come home. Her reply sounds aimed at a
professional Umamusume. I watch as King Halo
smiles over the change in tone.
